task_title: Post-Work Bundle Admission Ring V0.2 schema enforcement and closure updater
owner_intent: Turn Post-Work Bundle Admission Ring V0.1 into enforced V0.2 closure path with schemas, validator, repair loop, and stronger organ teaching.

language_and_encoding_policy.taskpack_internal_files: All taskpack internal files are ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM only.
language_and_encoding_policy.canonical_repo_artifacts: All canonical repository artifacts created by this task must be ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM unless a file is explicitly owner-facing.
language_and_encoding_policy.owner_facing_russian_runtime_output: Owner-facing live and final runtime output must be Russian only after OFFICIO_AGENTIS role entry and must be routed through OFFICIO authority.
language_and_encoding_policy.cyrillic_in_taskpack: Cyrillic is forbidden in taskpack internal files. Russian owner-facing output is allowed only at runtime after OFFICIO route.
language_and_encoding_policy.localization_exception: OFFICIO controls owner-facing Russian. Machine JSON, schemas, validators, and contract files remain ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM.

enhanced_ghost_evolve.instruction: Servitor must teach organs by converting context, rules, skills, tools, doubts, and acceptance logic into durable contracts, schemas, templates, validators, receipts, and next-route cards.

hard_boundaries: Do not claim full semantic truth.
Do not claim full Custodes authority.
Do not create heavy local bundle artifacts without GitHub-safe index and privacy boundary.
No final PASS when required schema validation fails.
No final PASS when repair loop is missing or untested.
Commit and normal non-force push are required.
